title: MC: Zombified
description: MC: Zombified turns your Minecraft world into a zombie apocalypse! Only zombies will spawn, even in the Nether, replacing all other hostile mobs.
body:
![p](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/ced4f8898b6ba459f0ba60247deb04ffc01fd1db_0.webp)
#

# MC Zombified - Enhanced Zombie Apocalypse

MC Zombified transforms your Minecraft world into a brutal, zombie-overrun nightmare. Mobs are replaced by various zombie types, each with their own unique abilities and traits, ensuring challenging and unpredictable encounters.
#

#
## 📌 Features
- **Enhanced Zombie Variants:**
  - **Husks:** Increased speed (II) and jump boost, making them agile hunters
  - **Drowned:** Enhanced strength (II) and water breathing, deadly in aquatic environments
  - **Zombie Villagers:** Added speed and strength effects
  - **Zombified Piglins:** Fire resistance and increased strength
  - **All zombies have 30 hearts of health for increased challenge**

- **Rich Loot System:**
  - **Common Drops (All Zombies):**
    - Blaze rods (5% chance)
    - Golden apples (2% chance)
    - Diamonds (1% chance)
  - **Special Drops:**
    - Drowned: Prismarine shards (10% chance)
    - Husks: Sand (15% chance)
    - Zombified Piglins: Gold nuggets (20% chance)
    - Zombie Villagers: Emeralds (3% chance)

- **Visual Enhancements:**
  - Smoke particles around zombies at night
  - Atmospheric effects for better immersion

- **Complete Mob Replacement:**
  - All non-zombie mobs are prevented from spawning
  - Maintains the apocalyptic theme
  - Zombies have persistence (won't despawn naturally)

## 🔄 Compatibility
- Fully compatible with most datapacks and mods
- Ideal for survival challenges or hardcore worlds
- Works in both single-player and multiplayer

## 📥 Installation
1. Download the datapack and place it in your world's `datapacks` folder
2. Type `/reload` in-game or restart your server
3. Prepare for the apocalypse!

## 🎮 Gameplay Tips
- Use ranged weapons when possible due to increased zombie health
- Collect special drops from different zombie types for valuable resources
- Be extra careful at night when zombies emit smoke particles
- Consider using golden apples from zombie drops for healing

Feel free to leave feedback or suggest new zombie types and abilities!
